label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out what gift Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me start by listing out the initial gifts each person has. Initially: - Alice has green - Bob has white - Claire has black - Dave has orange - Eve has yellow Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me go through each step one by one and track the changes. First swap: Bob and Alice swap. So after this swap: - Alice, who had green, now has white (from Bob) - Bob, who had white, now has green (from Alice) So now: Alice: white Bob: green Claire: black Dave: orange Eve: yellow Second swap: Alice and Eve swap. Alice has white, Eve has yellow. After swapping: - Alice gets yellow - Eve gets white Now: Alice: yellow Bob: green Claire: black Dave: orange Eve: white Third swap: Claire and Eve swap. Claire has black, Eve has white. After swapping: - Claire gets white - Eve gets black Now: Alice: yellow Bob: green Claire: white Dave: orange Eve: black Fourth swap: Alice and Dave swap. Alice has yellow, Dave has orange. After swapping: - Alice gets orange - Dave gets yellow Now: Alice: orange Bob: green Claire: white Dave: yellow Eve: black Fifth swap: Bob and Eve swap. Bob has green, Eve has black. After swapping: - Bob gets black - Eve gets green So the final state would be: Alice: orange Bob: black Claire: white Dave: yellow Eve: green Wait, but let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't mix up any names. Let me go through again. Initial: A(green), B(white), C(black), D(orange), E(yellow) 1. B and A swap. A(white), B(green), C(black), D(orange), E(yellow) 2. A and E swap. A(yellow), B(green), C(black), D(orange), E(white) 3. C and E swap.
